name: fixListFormatting
description: EXPERIMENTAL: Attempts to detect paragraphs that look like lists (e.g., starting with -, *, 1.) and convert them to proper Google Docs bulleted or numbered lists. Best used on specific sections.

documentId.description: The ID of the Google Document (from the URL).

startIndex.description: Optional: The starting index of the text range (inclusive, starts from 1). If omitted, might apply to a found element or whole paragraph.

endIndex.description: Optional: The ending index of the text range (exclusive). If omitted, might apply to a found element or whole paragraph.

range.description: Optional: Limit the fixing process to a specific range.
